name: Medicus Pharma Ltd.
business: We are a clinical stage, multi-strategy biotech company focused on advancing novel and potentially disruptive select therapeutic assets through Phase 2 proof-of-concept and pursue out-licensing or strategic partnerships with established pharmaceutical companies that are best positioned to conduct late-stage development and commercialization. We are currently focused on two companies, SkinJect, a clinical stage biotech company developing doxorubicin containing microneedle arrays ("D-MNA"), a novel localized immunogenic precision therapy focused on non-melanoma skin diseases, especially basal cell carcinoma (BCC) of the skin, and Antev, a clinical stage biotech company, developing Teverelix, a next generation gonadotrophin-releasing hormone (GnRH) antagonist, as potentially a first in market product for advanced prostate cancer (APC) patients with high cardiovascular risk and patients with acute urinary retention relapse (AURr) episodes due to enlarged prostate.
sellsTo: advanced prostate cancer patients with high cardiovascular risk

exposures.sentence: We are currently focused on two companies, SkinJect, a clinical stage biotech company developing doxorubicin containing microneedle arrays ("D-MNA"), a novel localized immunogenic precision therapy focused on non-melanoma skin diseases, especially basal cell carcinoma (BCC) of the skin representing ~$2 billion in potential market opportunity and Antev, a clinical stage biotech company, developing Teverelix, a next generation gonadotrophin-releasing hormone (GnRH) antagonist, as potentially a first in market product for advanced prostate cancer (APC) patients with high cardiovascular risk and patients with acute urinary retention relapse (AURr) episodes due to enlarged prostate, collectively representing ~$6 billion in potential market opportunity.

the Company announced that it has entered into a non-binding letter of intent with Reliant AI Inc., a decision-intelligence company for the life sciences, specializing in generative AI, to collaborate on the development of an artificial-intelligence-powered data analytics platform designed to support clinical trial execution through data-driven insights.

catalysts.event: Announced positively trending interim analysis for SKNJCT-003 Phase 2 study
catalysts.sentence: On March 6, 2025, the Company announced a positively trending interim analysis for its SKNJCT-003 Phase 2 clinical study.

catalysts.event: Submitted comprehensive package to FDA for Type C meeting
catalysts.sentence: On July 8, 2025, the Company submitted a comprehensive package to the FDA seeking a Type C meeting during the week of October 6, 2025.

catalysts.event: FDA accepted Type C Meeting request
catalysts.sentence: On August 21, 2025, the Company announced that the FDA accepted the Company's Type C Meeting request to formally discuss the D-MNA product development and gain further alignment on the clinical pathway.

catalysts.event: FDA provided written responses agreeing on 505(b)(2) regulatory pathway
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, the FDA provided written responses to the Company's queries and agreed that the Company can rely on the 505(b)(2) regulatory pathway to treat BCC using D-MNA.

catalysts.event: Completed acquisition of 98.6% of Antev shares
catalysts.sentence: On August 29, 2025, we completed the acquisition of 98.6% of the issued and outstanding shares of Antev for aggregate consideration consisting of approximately US$2.97 million in cash and 1,603,164 common shares of Medicus.

catalysts.event: Received regulatory and ethical approvals in UK to expand SKNJCT-003
catalysts.sentence: On November 13, 2025, the Company announced that it received full regulatory and ethical approvals in the United Kingdom to expand its ongoing Phase 2 clinical study (SKNJCT-003) evaluating D-MNA for the non-invasive treatment of BCC.

catalysts.event: Applied for FDA Commissioner's National Priority Voucher
catalysts.sentence: On November 17, 2025, the Company announced that it applied for an FDA Commissioner's National Priority Voucher in connection with SKNJCT-003.

catalysts.event: Completed enrollment of 90 patients in SKNJCT-003 Phase 2 study
catalysts.sentence: On December 15, 2025, the Company announced that its Phase 2 clinical study (SKNJCT-003) evaluating safety and efficacy of D-MNA and C-MNA to non-invasively treat nodular BCC of the skin, has successfully completed enrolment of ninety (90) patients in the United States.

catalysts.event: Received study may proceed approval from UAE Department of Health for SKNJCT-004
catalysts.sentence: On May 22, 2025, the Company announced that it has received study may proceed approval from the United Arab Emirates (UAE) Department of Health to commence Phase 2 clinical study (SKNJCT-004) to non-invasively treat BCC of the skin.

catalysts.event: First patient enrolled in SKNJCT-004 Phase 2 study
catalysts.sentence: On October 22, 2025, the Company announced the enrollment of the first patient in its SKNJCT-004 Phase 2 clinical study evaluating a non-invasive treatment for BCC.

catalysts.event: Entered into non-binding letter of intent with Reliant AI Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On December 22, 2025, the Company announced that it has entered into a non-binding letter of intent with Reliant AI Inc., a decision-intelligence company for the life sciences, specializing in generative AI, to collaborate on the development of an artificial-intelligence-powered data analytics platform designed to support clinical trial execution through data-driven insights.

tamClaims.claim: Basal cell carcinoma represents ~$2 billion potential market opportunity
tamClaims.sentence: basal cell carcinoma (BCC) of the skin representing ~$2 billion in potential market opportunity

tamClaims.claim: Advanced prostate cancer and acute urinary retention relapse collectively represent ~$6 billion potential market opportunity
tamClaims.sentence: advanced prostate cancer (APC) patients with high cardiovascular risk and patients with acute urinary retention relapse (AURr) episodes due to enlarged prostate, collectively representing ~$6 billion in potential market opportunity
